notes: execution_target=selene; optimizer=random_batch; num_samples_feasible counts per-evaluation package-local samples against original coverage constraints; two_qubit_gate_count is derived from generated QAOA zz_phase terms; compiled circuit depth is unavailable from the current guppylang/hugr package API; lambda stores one penalty value per package-local block; compact_qubo: optional/incompat/dependency penalties without slack (capacity still uses slack); see qaoa.build_qubo_block_for_package(compact_penalties=True); fast_selene: batched theta search (one Nexus execute per package) + parallel packages; not SPSA/COBYLA — for wall-clock smoke tests only
